title: Youtube Essentials
description: Want to start a MC YT channel? Look no further!
body:
✨ YouTube Essentials

The ultimate lightweight modpack for creators and players alike!

Want to start (or upgrade) your Minecraft YouTube channel?
YouTube Essentials is built to make your gameplay smoother, cleaner, and easier to record — all while staying lightweight and beginner-friendly.

🎥 Perfect for Creators

- Replay Mod for cinematic shots
- Essential Mod for multiplayer and social tools
- Litematica for creative builds and timelapses
- Clean HUD & Full Bright for professional-looking footage

⚙️ Optimized for Performance

- Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore to boost FPS
- Entity Culling & Dynamic FPS for smoother visuals
- ImmediatelyFast & Fast IP Ping for better responsiveness
- Krypton, Debugify, and Spark for network and performance tuning

🌈 Visual Polish

- Iris Shaders & Continuity for better lighting and connected textures
- Xaero’s Minimap & World Map for clean overlays
- Dynamic Lights & Polytone for atmosphere

Whether you’re recording your next big series, streaming to friends, or just want a smoother Minecraft experience, YouTube Essentials keeps things simple, stylish, and fast.

💡 Built for Minecraft 1.21.5 — compatible with Fabric.

Enjoy!
